stages.concept:
# Unit 110: 비교급 + than / 비교급 강조 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **비교급 + than**과 **비교급 강조**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: **비교급 + than** — ~보다 더 …한

> She is **taller than** her sister.
> 그녀는 언니보다 키가 더 크다.

> This book is **more interesting than** that one.
> 이 책은 저 책보다 더 재미있다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 비교급 만드는 법:

| 규칙 | 예시 |
|------|------|
| 짧은 단어: +er | tall → taller, fast → faster |
| -e로 끝남: +r | large → larger, nice → nicer |
| 자음+y: y→ier | happy → happier, easy → easier |
| 단모음+단자음: 자음 겹침+er | big → bigger, hot → hotter |
| 긴 단어: more + 원급 | beautiful → more beautiful |
| 불규칙 | good → better, bad → worse |

👩‍🏫 선생님: **비교급 강조** — much, even, still, far, a lot + 비교급

> She is **much taller** than me.
> 그녀는 나보다 훨씬 키가 크다.

> This is **even more** difficult than I thought.
> 이것은 내가 생각한 것보다 훨씬 더 어렵다.

> He is **far better** than his opponent.
> 그는 상대방보다 훨씬 더 낫다.

**Q. 다음 중 비교급을 강조하는 표현으로 쓸 수 '없는' 것을 고르세요.**
1. much
2. very ✅
3. far

👩‍🏫 선생님: 맞아요! very는 원급만 꾸며줄 수 있고, 비교급(더 ~한)을 꾸밀 때는 much, even, still, far, a lot을 써야 한답니다.

🧑‍🎓 학생: 비교급 + than(~보다 더)! much/even/far로 비교급을 강조할 수 있군요. very는 비교급 강조에 못 쓴다는 것도 기억!
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 110: 비교급+than 비교급 강조 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Your room is (     ) than mine.
> **정답** bigger

---

**02.** She is ? than her sister.
> **정답** taller

---

**03.** This test is ? than the last one.
> **정답** easier

---

**04.** He runs ? than me.
> **정답** faster

---

**05.** Today is ? colder than yesterday.
> **정답** much (even/far)

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
She is more tall than me.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** more tall → taller

---

**07.** This is gooder than that.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** gooder → better

---

**08.** He is more faster than me.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** more faster → faster

---

**09.** Today is very colder than yesterday.
(비교급 강조)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** very → much (even/far)

---

**10.** This bag is more cheaper than that one.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** more cheaper → cheaper

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
그는 나보다 키가 크다.
He is me.
> **정답** taller than

---

**12.** 오늘은 어제보다 훨씬 더 춥다.
Today is colder than yesterday.
> **정답** much

---

**13.** 이 문제는 저것보다 더 쉽다.
This problem is that one.
> **정답** easier than

---

**14.** 그녀는 나보다 훨씬 더 빠르다.
She is faster than me.
> **정답** much (far/even)

---

**15.** 영어가 수학보다 더 재미있다.
English is math.
> **정답** more interesting than

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
그녀는 그보다 더 똑똑하다.
She is smarter him than
> **정답** She / is / smarter / than / him

---

**17.** 오늘은 어제보다 훨씬 더 덥다.
Today much is hotter than yesterday
> **정답** Today / is / much / hotter / than / yesterday

---

**18.** 이 책은 저것보다 더 두껍다.
This book thicker is than that one
> **정답** This / book / is / thicker / than / that / one

---

**19.** 그는 나보다 훨씬 더 빨리 달린다.
runs He much faster than me
> **정답** He / runs / much / faster / than / me

---

**20.** 수학이 과학보다 더 어렵다.
Math more is difficult than science
> **정답** Math / is / more / difficult / than / science
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 110: 비교급+than  비교급 강조 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
I like English _______________ than math.
But, my math grade is __________________ than
English grade.
more - more high
more - higher
much - higher
more - more higher
> **정답** more - higher

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
My brother is __________________ than Tom
But Tom is __________________ than my brother.
handsome - braver
more handsome - more brave
handsome - more brave
more handsome - braver
> **정답** more handsome - braver

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 알맞은 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개)
Today is ___________ than yesterday.
Tomorrow will be ____________ than today.
more cold - very colder
colder - much colder
colder - very colder
colder - a lot colder
> **정답** colder - a lot colder, colder - much colder

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 알맞지 않은 것을 고르시오.
It is ________________ darker in winter than in
summer.
very
far
even
much
> **정답** very

---

**05.** 다음 문장에 a lot을 넣어 강조하려고 한다. 알맞은 위치를
고르시오.
Amy ①drives ②more③ carefully ④than ⑤she used
to.
> **정답** 2

---

**06.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Can you put the clock higher than now?
He looks more handsome than before.
Which coffee is more sweeter between the
two?
Today is colder than yesterday.
> **정답** Which coffee is more sweeter between the two?

---

**07.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
I like beef a lot more than pork.
Amy is far smarter than her sister.
Tonight, she is much prettier than usual.
The lady looked very happier today.
> **정답** The lady looked very happier today.

---

**08.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
호박수프는 우리가 생각했던 것보다 훨씬 맛있었다.
The pumpkin soup was much more delicious
than we thought.
The pumpkin soup was very more delicious
than we thought.
The pumpkin soup was much deliciouser than
we thought.
The pumpkin soup was much more
deliciouser than we thought.
> **정답** The pumpkin soup was much more delicious than
we thought.

---

**09.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그의 이야기는 지난번보다 훨씬 더 길었다.
His story was far more long than before.
His story was far longer than before.
His story was far more longer than before.
His story was very more long than before.
> **정답** His story was far longer than before.

---

**10.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
넌 그 공을 나보다 훨씬 더 세게 찰 수 있니?
Can you kick the ball very much hard than I
can?
Can you kick the ball far harder than I can?
Can you kick the ball far more hard than I can?
Can you kick the ball very more hard than I
can?
> **정답** Can you kick the ball far harder than I can?

---

**11.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
This classroom is even brighter than the
school gym.
Amy's car is more expensive than his.
Tom's novels are entertaining than
those of Amy.
The weather in Korea is warmer than that of
Canada.
> **정답** Tom's novels are entertaining than those of
Amy.

---

**12.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
The Chines population is greater than the
Korean population.
Traffic in Korea is busier than that in
Singapore.
Tom's luggage contains less things than
Amy's.
Russia is very larger than Japan.
> **정답** Russia is very larger than Japan.

---

**13.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
Her idea was far good than his idea.
Love is very more important than money.
Amy is even angrier than last time I saw her.
Tom tried more hard than Amy.
> **정답** Amy is even angrier than last time I saw her.

---

**14.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
Amy is talkativer than Tom.
Jeju island is beautifuler than Hawaii
My father gets up early than my mother.
His room is a lot cleaner than his brother's.
> **정답** His room is a lot cleaner than his brother's.

---

**15.** 다음 주어진 정보와 일치하는 것을 고르시오.
Hong Kong: 33 °C
Seoul: 28 °C
Los Angeles: 17°C
Hong Kong is cooler than Seoul.
Seoul is warmer than Los Angeles.
Seoul is as warm as Los Angeles.
Seoul is warmer than Hong Kong.
> **정답** Seoul is warmer than Los Angeles.

---

**16.** 다음 주어진 정보와 일치하는 것을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
Tom: 60kg, 170cm
Amy: 50kg, 160cm
Sally: 45kg, 157cm
Sally is taller than Tom.
Sally is shorter than Amy.
Tom is lighter than Amy.
Amy is heavier than Sally.
> **정답** Amy is heavier than Sally., Sally is shorter than Amy.

---

**17.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
His English grade is badder
than mine.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** badder → worse

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Tom came to school earlier as
Amy today.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** as → than

---

**19.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Getting a shot is painful than
taking medicine.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** painful → more painful

---

**20.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
[2개] (비교급 사용)
I am younger as my sister, and I eat far
less than her. She is taller than me because
she eats more healthy food than what I eat. I
eat cookies and chocolate too much. Cookies and
chocolate contain much more fat than other
food. I will try to eat less of them.
> **정답** than, far, less, healthier, much
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 110 비교급+than  비교급 강조중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 배열하시오.
나는 그보다 빨리 나의 숙제를 마칠 수 있다.
힌트 (     ) than, faster, my, him, homework
I can finish  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 my, homework, faster, than, him

---

**02.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 배열하시오.
그녀의 목표는 우리들의 목표보다 훨씬 높다.
힌트 (     ) even, than, higher, is, ours
Her goal  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 is, even, higher, than, ours

---

**03.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 배열하시오.
Kelly의 옷은 Vivian의 옷보다 훨씬 편안해 보인다.
힌트 (     ) comfortable, more, a lot, than
Kelly's outfit looks  (     )   (     )   (     )  
 Vivian's.
정답 a, lot, more, comfortable, than

---

**04.** 어법상 틀린 부분을 찾아 고쳐 쓰시오. (비교급 표현)
The coffee was sweet than the tea.
→ The coffee was
.
정답 sweeter than the tea

---

**05.** 어법상 틀린 부분을 찾아 고쳐 쓰시오. (비교급 표현)
His mistake was as serious than mine.
→ His mistake was  (     )  mine.
정답 more serious than

---

**06.** 어법상 틀린 부분을 찾아 고쳐 쓰시오. (비교급 표현)
Those clothes are much more cheap than I
expected.
→ Those clothes are  (     )  I
expected.
정답 much cheaper than

---

**07.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오. (비교급 문장)
even, healthy
A: Why do you always eat homemade food? Don't you
eat fast food?
B: I sometimes do, but homemade food is
 fast food.
정답 even healthier than

---

**08.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오. (비교급 문장)
far, bad
A: How is your English grade?
B: It is bad, but my math grade is 
the English grade.
정답 far worse than

---

**09.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오. (비교급 문장)
far, small
A: Are there more people in Korea than in USA?
B: No, The Korean population is 
the US population
정답 far smaller than

---

**10.** 주어진 형용사를 알맞은 비교급으로 고쳐 다음 글을
완성하시오.
Our neighbor's house is very big. Our house is
much [small] (     )  our neighbor's. Their
house is [colorful] (     )  our house.
정답 smaller than, more colorful than

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 110: 비교급+than / 비교급 강조 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
I like science _______________ than art.
But, my art grade is __________________ than science grade.
more - more high more - higher much - higher more - more higher
> 정답: more - higher

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
My sister is __________________ than Amy.
But Amy is __________________ than my sister.
handsome - braver more beautiful - more brave beautiful - more brave more beautiful - braver
> 정답: more beautiful - braver

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 알맞은 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) Today is ___________ than yesterday.
Tomorrow will be ____________ than today. more hot - very hotter hotter - much hotter hotter - very hotter hotter - a lot hotter
> 정답: hotter - a lot hotter, hotter - much hotter

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 알맞지 않은 것을 고르시오.
It is ________________ colder in winter than in summer. very far even much
> 정답: very

---

**05.** 다음 문장에 a lot을 넣어 강조하려고 한다. 알맞은 위치를 고르시오.
Amy ①drives ②more③ carefully ④than ⑤she used to.
> 정답: 2

---

**06.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Can you place the shelf higher than now?
She looks more elegant than before.
Which tea is more sweeter between the two?
Today is warmer than yesterday.
> 정답: Which tea is more sweeter between the two?

---

**07.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
I like chicken a lot more than fish.
Tom is far smarter than his brother.
Tonight, she is much prettier than usual.
The boy looked very happier today.
> 정답: The boy looked very happier today.

---

**08.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
토마토수프는 우리가 생각했던 것보다 훨씬 맛있었다.
The tomato soup was much more delicious than we thought. we thought.
The tomato soup was very more delicious than we thought.
The tomato soup was much deliciouser than we thought.
The tomato soup was much more deliciouser than we thought.
> 정답: The tomato soup was much more delicious than we thought.

---

**09.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그녀의 발표는 지난번보다 훨씬 더 길었다.
Her presentation was far more long than before.
Her presentation was far longer than before.
Her presentation was far more longer than before.
Her presentation was very more long than before.
> 정답: Her presentation was far longer than before.

---

**10.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
넌 그 공을 나보다 훨씬 더 멀리 던질 수 있니?
Can you throw the ball very much far than I can?
Can you throw the ball far farther than I can?
Can you throw the ball far more far than I can?
Can you throw the ball very more far than I can?
> 정답: Can you throw the ball far farther than I can?

---

**11.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
This room is even brighter than the school gym.
Amy's phone is more expensive than his.
Famous novels are entertaining than those of unknown writers. unknown writers.
The weather in Korea is warmer than that of Canada.
> 정답: Famous novels are entertaining than those of unknown writers.

---

**12.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
The Indian population is greater than the Korean population.
Traffic in Seoul is busier than that in Busan.
Tom's bag contains less things than Amy's.
France is very larger than Korea.
> 정답: France is very larger than Korea.

---

**13.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
Her plan was far good than his plan.
Health is very more important than money.
Tom is even angrier than last time I saw him.
Amy tried more hard than Tom.
> 정답: Tom is even angrier than last time I saw him.

---

**14.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
Amy is talkativer than Tom.
Jeju island is beautifuler than Bali.
My mother gets up early than my father.
His desk is a lot cleaner than his sister's.
> 정답: His desk is a lot cleaner than his sister's.

---

**15.** 다음 주어진 정보와 일치하는 것을 고르시오.
Tokyo: 35 °C Seoul: 30 °C London: 20°C Tokyo is cooler than Seoul.
Seoul is warmer than London.
Seoul is as warm as London.
Seoul is warmer than Tokyo.
> 정답: Seoul is warmer than London.

---

**16.** 다음 주어진 정보와 일치하는 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) Tom: 65kg, 175cm Amy: 55kg, 163cm Sam: 50kg, 160cm Sam is taller than Tom.
Sam is shorter than Amy.
Tom is lighter than Amy.
Amy is heavier than Sam.
> 정답: Amy is heavier than Sam., Sam is shorter than Amy.

---

**17.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. His  math  grade  is  badder than  mine. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: badder → worse
